summary: Comprehensive testing of multi-page scanned PDF OCR and tactic-based prompt quality. All 8 backend tests passed. Frontend guided upload flow verified working.
passed_tests: GET /api/debug/pipeline shows all stages green including pdf_image_support with pymupdf version 1.27.2.2
POST /api/analyze/image with multi-page scanned PDF (3 pages, 8MB) - OCR'd all 3 pages, returned 689 chars combined text
Multi-page OCR stages: file_received -> type_detection -> pdf_extract (0 chars) -> pdf_text_check (fail) -> pdf_to_images (3 pages) -> ocr_complete (3 pages, 689 chars) -> gpt_analysis -> db_save
POST /api/analyze/image with single-page scanned PDF uses OCR path correctly
POST /api/analyze/image with text-based PDF uses fast path (gpt_analysis, no OCR/vision)
POST /api/analyze/text with mode=deep for antagonist scene - NO therapy language found (guilt, shame, vulnerability, etc.)
Deep mode objective: 'to put maria in her place by seizing narrative control and making her accept his dominance' - tactic-based
POST /api/analyze/text with mode=quick returns tactic-based beats (Dismiss and reframe, Name the hierarchy, etc.)
POST /api/analyze/image with JPEG still works (regression test passed)
Frontend: Page loads with Actor's Companion title
Frontend: Paste script and Upload file tabs visible and clickable
Frontend: Upload file tab shows drag-drop area with Quick (~15s) and Deep (~30s) mode options
seed_data_creation: Used existing /tmp/multi_page_scanned.pdf (3-page, 8MB scanned PDF). Created /tmp/text_sides.pdf (text-based PDF) and /tmp/scanned_sides.pdf (single-page scanned PDF) for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-page OCR and prompt quality fully tested. Key findings: 1) Multi-page scanned PDFs (up to 5 pages) are OCR'd page-by-page via GPT Vision, text concatenated with double newlines. 2) ocr_complete stage in _debug shows pages_ocrd and total_chars. 3) Prompts produce tactic-based language - tested with antagonist scene, no therapy words (guilt/shame/vulnerability) found in objective or what_they_hide. 4) Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_multipage_ocr_and_prompts.py can be reused. GPT calls take 30-60s for multi-page OCR.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No bugs found. All new features working correctly.
